Called once per turn, so that maps can experience the passage of time.

Called once per turn, so that the broadsword experience the location

togglePortability() - Method in class edu.monash.fit2099.engine.items.Item
Switch portability from 'true' to 'false', set portability to true allows the item to be picked up or dropped by actor.
